examples: This is a region to be treated with circumspection.
The quality of being discreet; circumspection.
Therefore, this Court will hew closely to the time-honored rule to sever with circumspection .
Venter's Great Man act might frustrate those who like their science with a dose of modesty or circumspection.
But it is understandable that a brand-new red-Green government should have been treated with circumspection by its partners in such a crisis.
